description: Style NotePair of shoes with a fun twist, this piece from catwalk is for those who are tired of the standard foot staples. Pair these with a short pleated skirt for an emo-style vibe or with rolled up denims (we recommend colour pop ones!) and a tonal tee.Product DetailsWhite shoes with central lace-ups, overlays, padded tongue and innerRubber outsole with textured grooves and a wedge heelMaterial and CarePlastic and syntheticWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlightSizeHeel: 3"
